title: 3 Doors of Horrors
overview: 3 horror shorts from Malaysia  I Miss You Two: School life is one of the most interesting moments in a lifetime. Some people, some things, will forever be carved in one’s memory.  Floating Sun: The novelist, Fiona Lim, is writing a true story of a teenage girl who drowned in a river many years ago.  Horror Mission: A local film crew is shooting a horror film in the suburb when the actress playing the ghost is suddenly possessed by a spirit.
